flags.message: Forward-mode cell on a stale record: the snapshot is dated 2026-07-11 but its docket data was last refreshed from CourtListener on 2020-03-25 (the docket has been blocked from indexing since 2021-04-18, date_terminated null). A CA1 appeal docketed 2019-11-01 is almost certainly already disposed of in reality by mid-2026, so this cell behaves like an undated replay rather than a genuinely pending forward case. I deliberately made no live CourtListener/MCP reads of this docket, since any current fetch would likely reveal the realized outcome; the prediction rests on the provisioned snapshot, corpus priors, and the statpack.

Corpus row quality: `fedcourts query --court ca1 --topic "3440 Other Civil Rights"` returned ca1/4680 (docket 18-1898, era 2010s) whose summary/citation text is from an early-1900s Missouri state-court opinion (e.g. 'Appeal from the Circuit Court of the City of St. Louis', R.S. 1909 citations) — the opinion text appears joined to the wrong docket. Worth a spot-check of the corpus opinion-to-docket join for CA1 rows.
